name: RestrictedContentDL Bot
description: Telegram bot to download restricted content from channels/groups.

API_ID.description: Teri API_ID jo my.telegram.org se milegi.

API_HASH.description: Teri API_HASH jo my.telegram.org se milegi.

SESSION.description: Pyrogram String Session (User Account). Restriction bypass karne ke liye zaroori hai.

AUTH_USERS.description: Un users ki ID jinhe bot use karne ki permission deni hai (space separated).

FORCED_SUB.description: Channel username (bin @ ke) agar force subscribe lagana hai toh.
